model_portfolio_size: 0% pre-trigger; conditional <=5% only after evidence and trigger clearance
downside_or_stop_distance: 6.7% to 61.8 TWD tactical invalidation level, based on TWSE MIS midpoint reference
liquidity_cap: 5% single-name cap binds before ADV in model-portfolio units; exit capacity still requires live depth check
hedge_posture: No hedge; size-down/no-position is cleaner than an index hedge because the intended exposure is idiosyncratic small-cap AI imaging SoC momentum.
add_rule: Do not open model position until either (1) price consolidates above 62.7/61.8 TWD with volume normalization and revenue/EPS evidence improves, or (2) a close above 68.9 TWD is followed by company-supported order/revenue confirmation, not only narrative momentum.
trim_rule: If a post-trigger starter exists, trim/re-underwrite on a close back below 62.7 TWD or if monthly revenue remains negative YoY without offsetting customer/order proof.
exit_rule: Exit/watch-only if price breaks 61.8 TWD, May/June momentum fails, or official revenue/EPS path does not validate AI/automotive SoC thesis.
max_loss_posture: 0 units at risk now; illustrative post-trigger 5% model position with a 6.7% stop would risk roughly 0.34% of model NAV, below the 0.50% wait-entry risk budget.
monitoring_cadence: Daily price/volume until momentum cools; monthly revenue after TWSE release; quarterly EPS and margin after next reported quarter.
